best_unix_strategy: Use POSIX shell tools to strip fenced code blocks and blockquoted lines, then count heading markers by level and assemble the requested JSON object from the remaining Markdown headings.
rationale: The unix implementation passed the benchmark using only POSIX shell tools, albeit with 17 invalid responses and 1 policy denial. Both the hybrid and unix approaches successfully parsed the Markdown release notes as required, so there is no hybrid-minus-unix pass-rate gap to admit as AST-structural.
